Version.summary: Add a morning temple visit at Kinkaku-ji and an afternoon tea ceremony to Day 1.
Add a ramen restaurant to Day 1 evening, scheduled between the afternoon tea ceremony and dinner.
In the current plan, change the existing temple visit activity to a friend visit instead.
Add Day 2 with a morning bamboo forest and Fushimi Inari visit, and an evening geisha district walk.

Task.task_name: 5-Day GRE Prep Plan (Quant AM, Verbal PM, Mixed Review Evenings)

Version.summary: Add a 30-minute vocabulary flashcards session to Day 3 evening, right after the reading comprehension block.
Remove the short break scheduled between the morning quant block and the afternoon verbal block on Day 1 of the active plan.
Add a 30-minute vocabulary review session to Day 2 morning of the active plan.
Add a practice test to Day 4 afternoon of the active plan.
In the active plan, replace every museum item with a Chinese food / Chinese restaurant meal in the same day/time slot.
Update all Chinese food/Chinese restaurant meal options in my current plan to Italian food/Italian restaurant meal options.
